# ArrayList

## Core definition
- performance advantages: 
	- space-efficient representation for a sequence of variables
	- random access to any given variable in the sequence is a fast, constant-time operation.
- disadvantage: size-changing is slow
	- array-backed lists is constant
- It is one of the built-in Java types: java.util.ArrayList
- get and size is  $\Theta(1)$
